title: Buffett Portfolio Tracker
summary: A live web dashboard tracking Berkshire Hathaway's 13F SEC filings, with automated GitHub Actions updates and GitHub Pages hosting. Built in Python with EDGAR API integration.

title: Nestle — Roommate Finder
summary: An iOS app built in SwiftUI for finding compatible roommates. Features 12 screens, MVVM architecture, MapKit integration, and full dark mode support targeting iOS 16+.

title: PumpWatch
summary: A crowdsourced gas price community reporting web app for the Bay Area. Anonymous, real-time reporting powered by Supabase backend and deployed on Vercel.

title: BarkPark
summary: An iOS app for discovering dog parks in your area. Built in SwiftUI with location-based search, park ratings, and a clean map-driven browsing experience.

title: Example Hidden Project
summary: This project only appears after clicking 'View more' — demonstrating the expand behavior. Delete this entry or set it as one of your real projects.
